text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot Tokai Teio and Mejiro McQueen
skulking in the shade of a tree.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hehehe! Let's watch them for a little longer. It
looks like they're talking about our best qualities!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Mortifying. I can't believe that we're
eavesdropping... Just a moment longer.
Understood?
I follow their gaze to find...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Are you even listening? I'm telling you Teio's final sprint is way cooler!

text_block_list.name: Satono Diamond
text_block_list.text:
McQueen is far more elegant and graceful! The
way she carries herself is just so radiant...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Easy there, you two! Arguing about whether Teio
or McQueen's the better runner again?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Oh, Nature! And...

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I have access to a great deal of information
concerning the two in question.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Me too! I know all about 'em too!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
...Aaand it looks like we've got all our experts
here, so let's get into our presentations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I heard this from Mayano, but she said Teio
anonymously sent McQueen some honey when
she wasn't feeling well.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
I have it on good authority that McQueen
possesses a collection of all race footage
featuring Teio. She uses it to study Teio's racing
technique.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Oh, come to think of it, Teio did spend a
whole day speaking like McQueen so she could
understand her better.

text_block_list.name: Ikuno Dictus
text_block_list.text:
There are also rumors suggesting McQueen
attempted to sneak into the student council
office as part of her research into Teio.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Okay, time for Turbo to talk! So actually, the two
of them are—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: OKAAAY! That's enough!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How dare you run your mouth with such
falsehoods! W-well, they may not all be
falsehoods, but still!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Ohoho? Hold on now, were you two
eavesdropping on us?

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Uh-ohhh! Eavesdropperrrrs! ♪ Eavesdroppers on
the loooose! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Ugh! This is all your fault! You're the one who
suggested listening in on their conversation!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
What? You were the one who was all enthusiastic
about it!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
You're always like this! Doing whatever you
please and getting others involved in your antics!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I never forced you to do anything you didn't want
to! If you've got a problem, then let's settle things
right here, right now!

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Ooooh, is this a fight? Or maybe a race?! I wanna
race too if you guys are gonna!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. A race is in order if we are to settle the
score!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
At least, it would be if we didn't have a photo
shoot shortly after this...

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Then how about something really quick?! Liiike...
rock, paper, scissors!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Rock, paper, scissors, eh? That's not really...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Nah... That's not gonna cut it.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Indeed. I must admit that I'm with you on that.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text: Huh? Why not?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Cause if I'm having a showdown with McQueen, I
don't want to leave anything to luck.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would also prefer to win against Teio by my own
strength.

text_block_list.name: Twin Turbo
text_block_list.text:
Strength... Strength... Strength... How's about
arm-wrestling, then?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I guess I'm fine with that. It'd be a quick way to
test our abilities against each other!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Now, now. We don't want to set a bad example
for the younger students by having such a childish
contest.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: If only someone could help us settle this situ—

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Oh! Perfect timing, Trainer! Could you come and
mediate between these two?
choice_data_list:
If the battle's important, you should save it for
later.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
If the battle's important? Well, I suppose you
have a point, but...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Wait, didn't you guys say that you have a photo
shoot or something?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh, the photo shoot!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Teio, we must hurry! We can still make it if we run!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: R-right! Okay, see you all later!
And with that, the two run off together.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
...Did you really sneak into the student council
office?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I would never! Is it true that you mimicked my
speech patterns?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They won't admit it, but they actually get along
pretty well...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Ahaha, they sure do.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
All right! Now we can battle it out without holding
anything back! Let's do this!

As the two of them have such similar strength, the
ensuing battle drags on...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: YOU TWO! You don't show up at the photo shoot, and when I come out looking for you, this is what you're doing?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?! The photo shoot... UH-OH!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
How could this have happened? We completely
forgot about it...

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text:
Save your remorse for later! The president and
the others have been waiting for too long
already! Let's go!

And with that, Tokai Teio and Mejiro McQueen
are dragged off to their photo shoot...
